title: O'Ivan Fortunatov
paragraphs:
I:
There walks o'Ivan Fartunatov across a land that is entirely narrowish... Suddenly, hark - a kopeck fell. And right onto his bruderschaft. Ivan got upset, Fortunatov grew sad, only o' didn't give a damn. The fairy tale takes a long time to tell, but the elephant, regardless, is bigger. So, in order not to crush pearls in the milk of a beloved woman, I will continue from the beginning. There walks, then, o'Ivan Fortunatov...
